documentation.file_docstring: Signal reactions via signal-cli JSON-RPC API
inline_comments: Send a Signal reaction to a message @param recipient - UUID or E.164 phone number of the message author @param targetTimestamp - Message ID (timestamp) to react to @param emoji - Emoji to react with @param opts - Optional account/connection overrides
